recentHighlights: For the Cause (S4E22) — Eddington's betrayal and the 'nobody leaves paradise' speech; the Federation as coercive belonging; Kasidy's return as Sovereignty Invariant I
The Muse (S4E21) — Onaya the creative vampire, Sisko's reclamation argument, Odo's wedding speech to Lwaxana as genuine care emerging from structural protection

Broken Link (S4E26 finale) — Odo returns to the Great Link infected, sentenced to become solid; the exile as punishment for betrayal of the collective; the changeling justice system as mirror of Federation expulsion
Paradise Lost (S4E12) — Leyton's coup, the four-changeling catalytic strategy, Joseph Sisko's sovereignty assertion
